features.name: Project Setup
features.description: Confirm the project can install dependencies, run verification, and start from a clean checkout.

features.name: sobench: Models + Workspace
features.description: 15 artifact dataclasses (from_dict/to_dict/validate) and Workspace class (path resolution, artifact I/O, blocked property). Foundation for all pipeline steps. Tests: tests/test_models.py, tests/test_workspace.py.

features.name: sobench: LLM Wrapper + CLI Scaffold
features.description: Thin mockable LLM wrapper (llm.complete(prompt) -> str) and CLI scaffold subcommand that creates a workspace dir and benchmark_intent.md template. Run/check/report stubs registered.

features.name: sobench: 14-Step Pipeline + Integration Smoke Test
features.description: All 14 pipeline steps (s01–s14), runner.py with SKIP_WHEN_BLOCKED logic, and CLI run/check/report wired. End-to-end smoke test over synthetic workspace (LLM mocked) confirms structural_check.json passed:true for a blocked cycle.
